title: ambrosia hispida
intro: Ambrosia hispida, also known as mealy cup sage or hairy ambrosia, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the western United States and Canada. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ambrosia hispida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to treat skin irritations and wounds.
